case_title: DAVID CHEN VS. SPRINT SOLUTIONS, INC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT SOLUTIONS, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.
